post.description:

**Permissions:** Agents or staff.

get.description:
List applications with filtering and pagination.

**Permissions:**
- Students: see only their own applications
- Agents: see applications they submitted
- Staff: see applications assigned to them; staff admins also see drafts assigned to them
- Admin: see all non-draft applications (with filters)

**Response includes:**
- items: List of application summaries
- total: Total count of matching applications
- limit/offset: Pagination parameters
- has_more: Whether more results exist
- query: Optional search across email, names, application UUID, tracking code
- include_archived: Set to true to include archived applications in results
- archived_only: Set to true to show ONLY archived applications

parameters.name: query

schema.description: Search by email, first/last name, application UUID, or tracking code
schema.title: Query

parameters.description: Search by email, first/last name, application UUID, or tracking code

patch.description:
**Step 0: Enrollment Selection**

Store Galaxy course/intake/campus selections for enrollment.

**Step 1/12: Personal Details**

Update student's personal information including contact details and identity documents.

**Step 2/12: Emergency Contact**

Add emergency contact information (at least one required).

**Step 3/12: Health Cover (OSHC)**

Provide Overseas Student Health Cover details.

**Step 4/12: Language & Cultural Background**

Provide language proficiency and cultural background information.

**Step 5/12: Disability Support**

Provide information about any disability and required support.

**Step 6/12: Schooling History**

Record schooling background details.

**Step 7/12: Previous Qualifications**

Indicate whether previous qualifications exist and capture details.

**Step 8/12: Employment History**

Add work experience (optional).

**Step 9/12: USI (Unique Student Identifier)**

Provide USI details (required for enrollment).

**Step 10/12: Additional Services**

Select optional services (accommodation, airport pickup, etc.).

**Step 11/12: Survey**

Complete pre-enrollment survey.

get.description:
**Step 12/12: Document Upload Status**

View status of required documents (actual upload handled separately).

post.description:
Upload a document for an application.

- **application_id**: UUID of the application
- **document_type_id**: UUID of the document type
- **file**: Document file (PDF, JPG, PNG, etc.)
- **process_ocr**: Whether to process OCR (default: true)
- **upload_mode**: "replace" (default) creates a new version if the doc type already exists,
  "new" always creates a new document entry (true multi-doc).

**Permissions:**
- Agent: Can upload to their own applications
- Staff: Can upload to assigned applications
- Admin: Can upload to any application

**File Requirements:**
- Allowed types: PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, BMP, GIF
- Maximum size: 20MB

**OCR Processing:**
- If enabled, extracts text and structured data
- Results available via GET /documents/{id}/ocr
- Auto-fill suggestions via GET /applications/{id}/documents/autofill

get.description:
Get all available document types.

Returns list of document types with their properties:
- id, code, name, stage
- is_mandatory: Whether document is required
- accepts_ocr: Whether OCR processing is available

schema.description: When true, return only initial upload document types (passport, english test, academic document, application form, other).

get.description:
Get extracted OCR data organized by application form sections.

Returns structured data grouped by:
- personal_details (from passport/ID)
- language_cultural (from IELTS/PTE tests)
- schooling_history (from academic transcripts)

Each section includes the full extracted data structure and source document info.

**Section will be null/empty if:**
- No document of that type uploaded yet
- Document uploaded but OCR not completed
- OCR failed for that document

Get OCR auto-fill suggestions for application form.

Analyzes all uploaded documents with OCR results and suggests
field values that can be auto-filled into the application form.

**Confidence Levels:**
- High (>0.8): Highly confident, safe to auto-fill
- Medium (0.5-0.8): Moderately confident, suggest to user
- Low (<0.5): Low confidence, show but don't auto-fill

Get document statistics for an application.

Returns counts by status, OCR status, and missing mandatory documents.

post.description:

Useful for testing new OCR models or re-extracting data.
Only admins and staff can trigger reprocessing.

**Actions**:

**Permissions:** Admin or staff admin permission

**Actions**:

- Creates timeline entry for audit trail

schema.title: Response List Agents For Staff Api V1 Staff Agents Get

patch.summary: Assign or remove agent on an application
patch.description:
Assign an agent to an application, or remove the agent assignment.

**Permissions:** Any staff member or admin.

**Request body**:
- `agent_id`: Agent profile ID (UUID) to assign, or `null` to remove assignment.

**Logic**:
- Looks up AgentProfile by `agent_id` (agent_profile.id). If not found, tries
  resolving via UserAccount.id → agent_profile.
- Sets `application.agent_profile_id` and commits.

schema.title: Response Assign Agent To Application Api V1 Staff Applications  Application Id  Assign Agent Patch

patch.description:
Transition application to a new workflow stage.

**Request body**:
- `to_stage`: Target ApplicationStage
- `notes`: Optional transition notes

**Validation**:
- Ensures transition is valid according to workflow rules
- Example: STAFF_REVIEW → OFFER_GENERATED (approve)
- Example: STAFF_REVIEW → REJECTED (reject)

**Actions**:
- Updates `current_stage`
- Creates `ApplicationStageHistory` record
- Creates timeline entry

post.description:

**Request body**:

- `is_internal`: If true, only visible to staff (not student/agent)

**Actions**:
- Creates `Comment` entry
- Visible in application comments

post.description:
Request additional or updated documents from student/agent.

**Request body**:
- `document_type_codes`: List of document type codes to request
- `message`: Message explaining what's needed
- `due_date`: Optional deadline

**Actions**:
- Adds request to `document.gs_document_requests` JSONB field
- Keeps application in STAFF_REVIEW stage
- Creates timeline entry
- Sends notification to student/agent (future)

Approve application and generate offer letter.

**Request body**:
- `offer_details`: Offer letter details (course_start_date, fees, conditions, etc.)
- `notes`: Optional approval notes

**Validation**:
- All mandatory documents must be VERIFIED

**Actions**:
- Updates `enrollment_data` with offer details
- Transitions to OFFER_GENERATED stage
- Sets `decision_at` timestamp
- Creates timeline entry
- Triggers offer letter generation (future: PDF)

Reject application with reason.

**Request body**:
- `rejection_reason`: Detailed reason for rejection (10-1000 characters)
- `is_appealable`: Whether student can appeal decision

**Actions**:
- Updates `enrollment_data` with rejection details
- Transitions to REJECTED stage
- Sets `decision_at` timestamp
- Creates timeline entry
- Sends rejection notification (future)

Record Genuine Student (GS) assessment for international student application.

**Request body**:
- `interview_date`: Date/time of GS interview
- `decision`: "pass", "fail", or "pending"
- `scorecard`: Assessment scorecard with criteria scores
- `notes`: Optional assessment notes

**Workflow**:
- If "pass": Returns to STAFF_REVIEW for final approval
- If "fail": Transitions to REJECTED
- If "pending": Remains in GS_ASSESSMENT stage

**Actions**:
- Updates `gs_assessment` JSONB field
- Creates timeline entry
- Transitions stage based on decision

Generate offer letter PDF for approved application.

**Request body**:
- `course_start_date`: Course commencement date
- `tuition_fee`: Tuition fee amount (overrides course default)
- `material_fee`: Additional material fees
- `conditions`: List of offer conditions
- `template`: Template name (default: "standard")

**Requirements**:
- Application must be in OFFER_GENERATED stage

**Actions**:
- Generates professional PDF offer letter
- Saves to uploads/offer_letters/ directory
- Returns URL/path to generated PDF

**Returns**: OfferLetterResponse with PDF URL and metadata

Manually map a local agent to a Galaxy agent using only the Galaxy ID.

The agent's organization name (agency_name) is used for display.

**Usage:**
1. GET /admin/galaxy/reference-data to fetch all Galaxy agents
2. Admin selects correct Galaxy agent from dropdown in UI
3. PATCH /admin/agents/{agent_id}/galaxy-mapping with selected galaxy_agent_id

**Request Body:**
- galaxy_agent_id: The Galaxy agent ID to map to (required)

**Permissions:** Admin only

delete.description:
Remove Galaxy agent mapping from a local agent.

Useful if agent was mapped incorrectly and needs to be remapped.

**Permissions:** Admin only

post.description:
Bulk update Galaxy agent mappings for multiple agents.

Useful for mapping multiple agents at once after initial setup or review.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "mappings": [
    {
      "agent_id": "uuid-1",
      "galaxy_agent_id": "1329",
      "galaxy_agent_name": "ABC Consulting"
    },
    {
      "agent_id": "uuid-2",
      "galaxy_agent_id": "567",
      "galaxy_agent_name": "XYZ Global"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Returns:**
- success: Overall success status
- updated: Number of agents successfully mapped
- failed: Number of agents that failed to map
- results: Details for each mapping attempt

**Permissions:** Admin only

Bulk import agents from CSV file.

CSV Format: email,organization_name,contact_person,phone,password

**Parameters:**
- file: CSV file upload
- dry_run: If true, validates without importing (default: true)

**Permissions:** Admin only

Updates local AgentProfile records with galaxy_agent_id by matching agency_name.

**Permissions:** Admin only

schema.title: Response Sync Galaxy Reference Data Api V1 Admin Galaxy Sync Reference Data Post

get.description:
Get offer letter URL for an application synced to Galaxy.

This endpoint retrieves the Galaxy enrollment ID from our sync logs and
returns the URL to download the offer letter from Galaxy.

**Workflow:**
1. Application synced to Galaxy → galaxy_student_id stored
2. Staff approves → enrollment created in Galaxy → enrollment_id returned
3. Use enrollment_id to get offer letter URL

**Returns:**
- offer_letter_url: Direct URL to download PDF from Galaxy
- galaxy_student_id: The Galaxy student hash for reference

**Permissions:** Admin only

Download offer letter PDF directly from Galaxy using the enrollment ID.

**Parameters:**
- enrollment_id: The Galaxy enrollment ID (encrypted/hashed string from Galaxy)
  Example: eyJpdiI6IitkRFpLM3VUUnNjODF5TzBnVk9aeEE9PSIsIn...

**Returns:**
- PDF file content (application/pdf)

**Permissions:** Admin only

Get the direct URL for downloading offer letter from Galaxy.

This returns the URL that can be used to redirect the user or download directly.

**Parameters:**
- enrollment_id: The Galaxy enrollment ID (encrypted/hashed string)

**Returns:**
- offer_letter_url: The full URL to download the offer letter

**Permissions:** Admin only

post.description:
Enroll a synced student to their course in Galaxy.

This endpoint triggers the Galaxy enrollment process (POST /students/enroll)
which happens AFTER the application has been synced and approved.

**Workflow:**
1. Application synced to Galaxy → galaxy_student_id stored
2. Staff approves application
3. Call this endpoint to enroll student in Galaxy
4. Galaxy returns enrollment_id (stored for offer letter generation)
5. If payment required, checkout URL is returned

**Parameters:**
- application_id: Our application UUID
- redirect_uri: URL where user returns after payment

**Returns:**
- enrollment_id: Galaxy's enrollment ID for offer letter generation
- checkout_url: Payment URL (if payment is required)
- booking_reference: Galaxy booking reference

**Permissions:** Admin only

get.description:
Get the Galaxy enrollment status and offer letter URL for an application.

This endpoint checks if the application has been enrolled in Galaxy and
returns the enrollment_id needed for offer letter generation.

**Returns:**
- galaxy_student_id: The Galaxy student ID (from sync)
- galaxy_enrollment_id: The enrollment ID (from enrollment) 
- offer_letter_url: URL to download offer letter (if enrolled)

**Permissions:** Admin only

post.description:
Webhook endpoint for Documenso signature events.

Documenso will POST here when:
- Document is viewed
- Document is signed by a recipient
- All signatures completed
- Document declined/expired

Test URL: POST /api/v1/webhooks/documenso
Header: X-Documenso-Secret: qwertyDoc

schema.title: Response Documenso Webhook Api V1 Webhooks Documenso Post

get.description:
Test endpoint to verify webhook URL is accessible.

GET /api/v1/webhooks/documenso/test

post.description:
Send offer letter for e-signature.

Uses either Galaxy enrollment ID to download offer letter, or a local template PDF.
Uploads to Documenso, adds signature fields, and sends to student and agent for signing.

**Workflow:**
1. Get offer letter PDF (from Galaxy if enrollment ID provided, else local template)
2. Create document in Documenso with student + agent as signers
3. Add signature fields
4. Send for signing (Documenso distribution without email)
5. Send Churchill template emails with signing links
6. Track in database

**Options (one of):**
- `galaxy_enrollment_id`: Download from Galaxy
- `template_path`: Use custom local template
- Neither: Use default template (docs/sampleTemplateForSign.pdf)

**Permissions:** Staff or Admin

get.description:
List all signature requests for an application.

**Permissions:** Staff/Admin or assigned Agent

Get status of a signature request.

**Parameters:**
- refresh: If true, fetches latest status from Documenso

**Permissions:** Staff or Admin

Download the signed document PDF.

Only available after all parties have signed.

**Permissions:** Staff or Admin

post.description:
Resend signature request emails to recipients.

**Permissions:** Staff or Admin

ScheduleGSMeetingRequest.title: ScheduleGSMeetingRequest
ScheduleGSMeetingRequest.description:
Request to schedule a GS assessment meeting.

**DateTime Format Options:**
1. ISO 8601 with timezone: "2026-01-23T14:00:00+11:00" (recommended)
2. ISO 8601 UTC: "2026-01-23T03:00:00Z" (will be converted to specified timezone)
3. Simple format: "2026-01-23T14:00:00" (interpreted as specified timezone)

**Additional Participants Format:**
- Simple email strings: ["email@example.com"]
- Object format: [{"email": "email@example.com", "name": "John Doe"}]
- Mixed: ["email@example.com", {"email": "another@example.com", "name": "Jane Doe"}]
